overview: A fast, accessible web app that helps users — especially those with low literacy or language barriers — understand medicine labels. Scan, upload, or type label text to get instant AI-powered translations and plain-language summaries in 12+ languages, with emergency alerts and voice read-aloud.
features: Camera capture, image upload, manual text entry, and sample demo mode
AI translation into 12+ languages in a single fast API call
7-section plain-language breakdown: Medication Name, Purpose, Dosage, How to Take, Warnings, Side Effects, Storage
Emergency red-banner alerts for critical keywords like overdose or allergy
Voice read-aloud with Play, Pause, and Stop controls
Mobile-first accessible design with large fonts and high-contrast colors
Performance-optimized: code splitting, lazy loading, minified bundles under 250KB
